'''''Dragon''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. It was presumably trying to destroy the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] heavy tugs under the command of [[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in order to stop a salvage attempt. It was destroyed by attacking [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]].<ref name="TIE Fighter" />
